subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! This Wronged One hath at this moment turned toward thee and maketh mention of thee, thou who hast ever been remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی این مظلوم در این حین بتو توجه نموده و ترا ذکر مینماید لازال مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort
